examples:
Command Example
!cuckoo-create-task-from-file entryID=814@a969c6ba-e443-4287-8dce-378aa183e2d5
Context Example
Human Readable Output
2. Get a task report
Retrieves a task report by a task ID.
Base Command
cuckoo-get-task-report

!cuckoo-create-task-from-file entryID=814@a969c6ba-e443-4287-8dce-378aa183e2d5
Context Example
Human Readable Output
2. Get a task report
Retrieves a task report by a task ID.
Base Command
cuckoo-get-task-report
Input
name: cuckoo-get-task-report

outputs.description: Category of task Cuckoo.Task.Machine Machine of task
outputs.name: Cuckoo.Task.Category

outputs.description: Errors of task Cuckoo.Task.Target Target of task
outputs.name: Cuckoo.Task.Errors

outputs.description: Package of task Cuckoo.Task.SampleID Sample ID of task
outputs.name: Cuckoo.Task.Package

outputs.description: Task guest Cuckoo.Task.Custom Custom values of task
outputs.name: Cuckoo.Task.Guest

outputs.description: Task owner Cuckoo.Task.Priority Priority of task
outputs.name: Cuckoo.Task.Owner

outputs.description: Platform of task Cuckoo.Task.Options Task options
outputs.name: Cuckoo.Task.Platform

outputs.description: Task status Cuckoo.Task.EnforceTimeout Is timeout of task enforced
outputs.name: Cuckoo.Task.Status

outputs.description: Task tags Cuckoo.Task.ID ID of task
outputs.name: Cuckoo.Task.Tags

outputs.description: Date the task was added Cuckoo.Task.CompletedOn Date the task was completed
outputs.name: Cuckoo.Task.AddedOn

outputs.description: Reported score of the the task Cuckoo.Task.Monitor Monitor of the reported task
outputs.name: Cuckoo.Task.Score

outputs.description: The SHA1 hash of the file. Cuckoo.Task.FileInfo.name The file name.
outputs.name: Cuckoo.Task.FileInfo.sha1

outputs.description: The file type. Cuckoo.Task.FileInfo.sha256 The SHA256 hash of the file.
outputs.name: Cuckoo.Task.FileInfo.type

outputs.description: Related URLs of the file. Cuckoo.Task.FileInfo.crc32 The CRC32 of the file.
outputs.name: Cuckoo.Task.FileInfo.urls

outputs.description: The file path. Cuckoo.Task.FileInfo.ssdeep The ssdeep of the file.
outputs.name: Cuckoo.Task.FileInfo.path

outputs.description: The size of the file. Cuckoo.Task.FileInfo.sha512 The SHA512 hash of the file.
outputs.name: Cuckoo.Task.FileInfo.size

outputs.description: The MD5 hash of the file.
outputs.name: Cuckoo.Task.FileInfo.md5
